channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Houston Field House Crane Operations – July 6
item.description: On Monday, July 6, from 7:00 AM to 4:00 PM, crane operations associated with the Houston Field House Renovation Project will require temporary traffic and pedestrian restrictions around Houston Field House, including the rear building access and parking near Harkness Field. The affected area will be an active construction zone during equipment delivery and installation. Normal traffic patterns will resume once the work is completed. Thank you for your cooperation.
item.author: Community

item.title: TIAA Confidential Counseling (By Phone or Video Conferencing)
item.description:
Date: Tuesday, July 7, 2026 8:30 AM - 5:00 PM - A TIAA Financial Consultant will be available for one-on-one consultations on a broad range of retirement topics. Attend this upcoming event to help you become better informed and more confident about Rensselaer’s retirement plan benefits. Consultations will be conducted in 60 minute increments. To schedule your individual retirement counseling, please call TIAA at 1-800-732-8353 or online at https://www.tiaa.org/public/login/schedule-meeting

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Faculty and Staff
